mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This batch contains UI metadata files with locators only. No enrollment methods, API helpers, or printer setup utilities found. Enrollment functionality likely exists in Python page object files or API helper modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription state verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. This batch contains only UI locator metadata. Subscription verification utilities likely exist in API helper files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status checking methods found in this batch. Only UI locators are present. Status verification methods likely exist in API helper or utility files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.

components_found_in_this_batch.what_it_does: Locator for the Pause Instant Ink button on the dashboard that temporarily suspends the subscription service. Has data-testid='pause-ii-plan-link-update-plan'.
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This locator directly targets the Pause Instant Ink button mentioned in precondition 3. It can be used to trigger the pause plan action required before the test begins.

test_case_mappings.batch_analysis_summary: Batch 1 contains UI metadata JSON files with locator definitions for HP Smart home page, authentication controls, billing forms, and dashboard pages. This batch provides navigation locators (Print and Payment History nav link, HP Instant Ink nav, dashboard nav) and authentication elements (username, password, sign in button) that are relevant to test case C44873414. However, the batch does NOT contain page-specific locators for the Print and Payment History page elements such as Billing Cycle Period card, progress bars, info icons, tooltips, or page usage text displays. The batch also lacks Python page object classes, action methods, verification methods, API helpers for backend operations (time shift, print simulation), and utility functions. The matched components are limited to navigation locators for reaching the target page and authentication elements for login prerequisites. Most test steps (2-21) have no matching components in this batch as they require page-specific locators and methods that are not present in these metadata files. The navigation locators found are valuable for steps 1 and 4 but insufficient for complete test automation. Page-specific elements, action methods, verification utilities, and API helpers are expected to exist in other batches containing Python page object files, helper modules, and utility classes.
